description: Updated planning template aligned with SYSTEM_INVARIANTS and guardrails requirements. All tasks must reference a registered execution pattern via a non‑null pattern_id and store artifacts within an isolated run directory.

task_kind.description: Type of task such as gap_resolution, maintenance or feature_work.

pattern_id.description: ID of the execution pattern used for this task. Must refer to an entry in PATTERN_INDEX. Patternless work is forbidden.

gap_id.description: Identifier of the gap being resolved, if any. Gaps must be explicitly tracked.

path_scope.description: Repository subdirectory that the task is allowed to modify. Must not include protected paths such as .git/objects/, .git/refs/heads/main, PATTERN_INDEX.yaml, schemas/*.schema.json or SYSTEM_INVARIANTS.md.

run_artifact_policy.description: Where run artifacts are stored during execution and whether they are cleaned up afterwards.

default_directory.description: Location relative to repository root where all artifacts produced by this run must be stored. The invariants require isolation inside .acms_runs/{run_id}/.

cleanup_after_run.description: If true, artifacts are removed once the task has completed successfully.

limits.description: Runtime and resource limits for this task, enforcing RL‑1 and RL‑2 invariants.

max_task_duration_minutes.description: Maximum allowed running time for the task in minutes.

max_file_size_mb.description: Maximum size in megabytes of any single file that can be modified or created.

max_changed_files.description: Maximum number of files that can be changed by this task.

max_changed_lines.description: Maximum number of lines of code that can be changed by this task across all files.

pre_validation_pattern.description: ID of the pattern used to validate preconditions before execution. Allows enforcement of guardrails PG‑3 and V‑2.

post_validation_pattern.description: ID of the pattern used to verify outputs and evidence after execution.

success_criteria.description: Description of what constitutes successful completion for this task, including required outputs and pass conditions.

failure_criteria.description: Description of the conditions that constitute failure for this task.
